about.title: Who We Are
about.headline: A family business with a tradition since 2000
about.p1: ALU and PVC Orlović are one of the leading joinery companies in Dalmatia. Since 2000, we have been supplying homes and commercial buildings across Croatia with premium windows, doors, and sliding walls. We treat every project as our own — from the first contact to the final installation.
about.p2: With over 1,000 successfully completed projects and a team of more than 10 skilled professionals, we prove every day what it means to work with the best European materials and without any compromise on quality.

brands.title: We Work With the Best
brands.subtitle: We use only proven profiles and fittings from leading European manufacturers.

items.name: Marko Horvat
items.text: Complete joinery replacement in an 80m² apartment. Quality workmanship, fast installation, and cleanup after the job. Highly recommended!

items.name: Ana Kovačević
items.text: The sliding walls are spectacular. From quote to installation, everything went smoothly and professionally.

items.name: Ivan Babić
items.text: They did the joinery for our entire building. Deadlines met, top-quality work. We will definitely work together again.

items.q: How long does window installation take for an apartment?
items.a: For an average apartment (50-80m²), installation takes 1-2 working days. For larger buildings, it depends on the number of openings — contact us for an estimate.
We use premium profiles from leading European manufacturers: Rehau, Schüco, and Veka. Each profile comes with a quality guarantee and certifications.
Yes, triple glazing is our standard for all PVC windows. It provides excellent thermal and sound insulation and long-term energy savings.

items.q: How much does window replacement cost?
items.a: The price depends on dimensions, profile type, and number of windows. Contact us for a free measurement and quote — we respond within 24 hours.
Our headquarters are in Budak, Stankovci (Zadar County) and we primarily work across Dalmatia — Zadar, Šibenik, Split and surroundings. For larger orders we accept projects throughout Croatia.
